As a Machine Learning Engineer with seven years in production AI systems, I own the complete ML lifecycle from data preprocessing and feature store design through distributed training, model optimization, and inference serving at scale.

My training infrastructure runs PyTorch and TensorFlow workloads across GPU clusters using CUDA-optimized data loaders and distributed training strategies (DDP, Horovod). I perform hyperparameter tuning with Optuna and Ray Tune, and track experiments with MLflow model registry for reproducible research-to-production handoffs.

Post-deployment, I instrument model monitoring pipelines that detect statistical drift and trigger automated retraining jobs. I have built quantization and pruning pipelines that reduce inference latency by 40% without meaningful accuracy loss. Real-time serving APIs are built on FastAPI with async request handling, while batch pipelines process offline scoring via scheduled Airflow DAGs. I have run A/B testing frameworks comparing model variants using statistical significance testing to guide rollout decisions.
